CustomField.description: Stores the DeveloperName of the Data Import Field Mapping Set custom metadata record used as the default mapping configuration. When the Field Mapping Method is set to Data Import Field Mapping, this value determines which mapping set is loaded during processing.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the DeveloperName of the Data Import Field Mapping Set custom metadata record to use as the default mapping configuration.
CustomField.label: Default Data Import Field Mapping Set
